_meta.doctrine: Paper 42 (LEAK + Oracle). When a bug escapes Inspector to production, run this postmortem to learn.
_meta.law: No postmortem = no learning = oracle stays at Level 0. Every escaped bug = oracle improvement opportunity.

escaped_bug.description: DESCRIBE THE BUG THAT ESCAPED TO PRODUCTION
escaped_bug.artifact_type: paper | page | code | diagram | app | skill
escaped_bug.inspector_run_id: REPORT_ID that should have caught this

miss_analysis.why_inspector_missed: WHICH UPLIFT WAS MISSING? (e.g., P16 — absence question not asked)
miss_analysis.missing_uplift: P11 | P13 | P16 | P17 | P21 | other
miss_analysis.missing_question: WHAT QUESTION WOULD HAVE CAUGHT THIS BUG?
miss_analysis.inspector_incorrect_verdict: PASS (incorrectly — the question was never asked)
miss_analysis.correct_verdict: FAIL — [specific reason why this should have failed]
miss_analysis.phuc_forecast_prediction: DID PHUC FORECAST PREDICT THIS GAP? YES | NO | NOT_RUNNING_YET

new_question.text: NEW QUESTION TO ADD TO QUESTION DB

rule_change.old_rule: WHAT WAS THE PREVIOUS RULE? (e.g., P16 was optional for code)
rule_change.new_rule: WHAT IS THE NEW RULE? (e.g., P16 is now MANDATORY for code)

oracle_level_change.reason: WHY DID THE ORACLE LEVEL CHANGE? (or not change)

action_items: Update oracle-memory.json with new miss rate
Re-run uplift audit on the escaped artifact
Verify new question catches the bug on re-audit
